code: import _asyncToGenerator from"@babel/runtime/helpers/asyncToGenerator";import{API_ROUTE}from"../utils/constants";export function fetchGeminiPrompt(_x){return _fetchGeminiPrompt.apply(this,arguments);}function _fetchGeminiPrompt(){_fetchGeminiPrompt=_asyncToGenerator(function*(body){var response=yield fetch(API_ROUTE.CREATE_PROMPT,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Falha ao gerar prompt com Gemini.');}return yield response.json();});return _fetchGeminiPrompt.apply(this,arguments);}export function fetchImagenGeneration(_x2,_x3){return _fetchImagenGeneration.apply(this,arguments);}function _fetchImagenGeneration(){_fetchImagenGeneration=_asyncToGenerator(function*(prompt,seed){var response=yield fetch(API_ROUTE.GENERATE_WALLPAPER,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({prompt:prompt,seed:seed})});if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Falha ao gerar wallpaper com Imagen.');}return yield response.json();});return _fetchImagenGeneration.apply(this,arguments);}
